content:
✨ omniget | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified desktop environment for downloading and studying online courses and digital books, enhancing the learning experience with integrated study tools and content management.
✨ Key Features: • Download and watch online courses (Hotmart, Udemy, Kiwify, etc.)
📖 Summary: OmniGet is an open-source desktop application designed for efficient online learning and content consumption. It allows users to download courses from various platforms and read digital books (PDF, EPUB) within the app, offering features like timestamped notes, flashcards, and focus modes to enhance studying. Additionally, it supports downloading videos from social media and torrents.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
